storytime.speaker: Emma (girl, 7)
storytime.input_text: Hello! Can you tell me a story about a brave rabbit?

storytime.speaker: Emma
storytime.input_text: What happened to the rabbit next? Did he find his way home?

storytime.speaker: Emma
storytime.input_text: That was brilliant! Can you tell me another one about a dragon?

music_commands.speaker: Oliver
music_commands.input_text: Stop! I want to talk to you instead.

music_commands.speaker: Oliver
music_commands.input_text: Can you turn the volume up a bit?

daily_chat.speaker: Lily (girl, 6)
daily_chat.input_text: I had a really fun day at school today! My teacher said I did great on my maths test.

daily_chat.speaker: Lily
daily_chat.input_text: Do you want to know what I had for lunch? I had fish and chips!

daily_chat.speaker: Lily
daily_chat.input_text: Can you sing me a song about the rain? It is raining outside.
